  • Les Paletuviers Restaurant

Senegal • Senegalese and seafood lodge dining

Les Paletuviers Restaurant

In the delta, the best dining is often at the lodge because boat transfers and evening light shape the experience.

★ 4.3 112 reviews
Image slot Restaurant Les Paletuviers Restaurant

About this restaurant

In the delta, the best dining is often at the lodge because boat transfers and evening light shape the experience.

Signature dish

Fresh fish, Senegalese sauces, and lodge meals

Practical information

Ask about half-board or full-board terms because independent dining choices are limited once based in the delta.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Sine-Saloum Delta.

Booking path

$$

Toubacouta, Sine-Saloum Delta

Les Paletuviers

A delta lodge base for boat trips, birdlife, mangroves, and slower Senegal travel.
